title: dichanthium sericeum subsp. polystachyum
intro: Dichanthium sericeum subsp. polystachyum, commonly known as the silky grama grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The silky grama grass is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the silky grama grass include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications.
